portability_cases.label: review style
portability_cases.top_result: For review responses, keep findings first and summary brief.

portability_cases.label: deploy rollback
portability_cases.top_result: Deployment rollback guardrail: if production deploy metrics regress, roll back within 15 minutes.

portability_cases.label: deploy checklist
portability_cases.top_result: Deployment checklist: require staging approval before production release.

portability_cases.label: review checklist
portability_cases.top_result: Auth review checklist: require tests and security review before merging sensitive changes.
